framework.name: Rate Anchoring Through Investment Pricing
framework.description: New consultants should deliberately underprice initial projects ($100-150/hour range) as 'business development investment,' then request rate increases after establishing reputation through successful calls. Timing the raise request immediately after delivering high-value work maximizes approval odds.
framework.raw_quote: if you're just getting started with expert network consulting or doing your first project with a new network, think about your first few projects as an investment in business development. Setting your rate on the lower end can help you land your initial projects

source.title: Setting Your Expert Network Consulting Rate • Expert Opportunities
